description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow for building and testing Monero on multiple platforms. The workflow should trigger on push and pull requests, excluding documentation and README changes. It should have separate jobs for building on macOS, Windows, and various Linux distributions (Debian, Ubuntu 22.04, Ubuntu 20.04), with each job setting up the environment, installing dependencies, and building the project. The workflow should also include jobs for testing and creating a source archive.
